query:
INSERT INTO material_colors (boardId, colorCode, colorName, fullCode, hexColor, thumbnailUrl, stockQuantity, notes, status) 
VALUES ((SELECT id FROM material_boards WHERE boardNumber = 'TEST-BOARD-001'), 'TEST-01', '测试蓝色', 'TEST-BOARD-001-TEST-01', '#4A90E2', NULL, 0, '这是一个测试颜色', 'active');
